additionalPlain:
With approximately 155 million monthly active users, WEBTOON Entertainment’s IP & Creator Ecosystem of aligned brands and platforms include WEBTOON, Wattpad--the world’s leading webnovel platform--WEBTOON Productions, Studio N, Studio LICO, WEBTOON Unscrolled, LINE MANGA, and eBookJapan, among others.
 
Join us and work with some of the biggest artists, IP, and fandoms in comics!
#WEBTOON
additional:
With approximately 155 million monthly active users, WEBTOON Entertainment’s IP & Creator Ecosystem of aligned brands and platforms include WEBTOON, Wattpad--the world’s leading webnovel platform--WEBTOON Productions, Studio N, Studio LICO, WEBTOON Unscrolled, LINE MANGA, and eBookJapan, among others.
 
Join us and work with some of the biggest artists, IP, and fandoms in comics!
#WEBTOON
descriptionPlain:
WEBTOON Entertainment is a leading global entertainment company and home to some of the world's largest storytelling platforms. As the global leader and pioneer of the mobile webcomic format, WEBTOON Entertainment has transformed comics and visual storytelling for fans and creators.
 
With its CANVAS UGC platform empowering anyone to become a creator, and a growing roster of superstar WEBTOON Originals creators and series, WEBTOON Entertainment’s passionate fandoms are the new face of pop culture. WEBTOON Entertainment adaptations are available on Netflix, Prime Video, Crunchyroll, and other screens around the world, and the company’s content partners include Discord, HYBE, and DC Comics, among many others.


We’re looking for a social media intern who can execute content ideas from beginning to end based on WEBTOON’s series and brand personality, has a pulse on trending pop-culture, and writes playful copy. You will work with internal stakeholders across Marketing, Partnerships, Creative, and Content.
**This is a paid internship position**
20-29 hour work week that’s flexible with your schedule. College graduates are preferred. 
Hybrid program that runs for 6 months. Our office is based in El Segundo, California. 
Gain hands-on marketing experience in a professional environment.
description:
WEBTOON Entertainment is a leading global entertainment company and home to some of the world's largest storytelling platforms. As the global leader and pioneer of the mobile webcomic format, WEBTOON Entertainment has transformed comics and visual storytelling for fans and creators.
 
With its CANVAS UGC platform empowering anyone to become a creator, and a growing roster of superstar WEBTOON Originals creators and series, WEBTOON Entertainment’s passionate fandoms are the new face of pop culture. WEBTOON Entertainment adaptations are available on Netflix, Prime Video, Crunchyroll, and other screens around the world, and the company’s content partners include Discord, HYBE, and DC Comics, among many others.

We’re looking for a social media intern who can execute content ideas from beginning to end based on WEBTOON’s series and brand personality, has a pulse on trending pop-culture, and writes playful copy. You will work with internal stakeholders across Marketing, Partnerships, Creative, and Content.

**This is a paid internship position**

  • 20-29 hour work week that’s flexible with your schedule. College graduates are preferred. 

  • Hybrid program that runs for 6 months. Our office is based in El Segundo, California. 

  • Gain hands-on marketing experience in a professional environment.

lists.content:
• Pitch content ideas and social media partnerships that will entertain and engage action, fantasy, anime, and gaming fans as well as comic fans

  • Assist with a large volume of short-form video content to be distributed via TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels 

  • Write copy for our owned-and-operated channels based on our brand personality

  • Assist with marketing campaigns and operations of our Ambassador community 

  • Recommend new influencers based on audience demographics, social media metrics, and content styles 

  • Update and track multiple content creation and upload schedules to ensure timely delivery of creative assets 

  • Schedule, organize, and monitor content performance with social media management tools (e.g. Sprinklr, CreatorIQ) 

  • Help optimize YouTube thumbnails, video titles, and video descriptions for owned-and-operated and influencer channels 

  • Other duties and projects as assigned

• You’re deeply engaged in WEBTOON and entertainment, especially with action, fantasy, anime, and gaming

  • You must be knowledgeable about social media platforms from the brand perspective, including (but not limited to) TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram

  • You’re overflowing with social media ideas based on pop culture, memes, and stories 

  • You thrive on producing entertaining, trending content that resonates with Gen-Z audiences

  • You can work in a fast-paced environment and execute multiple projects with enthusiasm and attention to detail

$18 - $18 / hourly
Please note, the above range is listed in USD.
